design: 3-arm EP re-measure: without / with-old / with-new; treatment = SKILL.md body + 3 touched references (filename-headered), per arm
executor: claude -p --model sonnet, CLAUDE_EFFORT=medium, empty external cwd, tools denied (Skill Task Read Grep Glob Bash Edit Write WebFetch WebSearch NotebookEdit), user CLAUDE.md relocated (HERMETIC_RELOCATE_USER_MEMORY=1), prompt via stdin
grading: reused benchmarks/2026-07-08-skills-hermetic/{grade,prosecute_counts}.workflow.js (model sonnet), blind (arm withheld); met_final = min(grader_met, prosecutor_met) per ADR 0025
